rationale.completeness: Implements core SSE requirements (SSEResponse, SSEvent, event formatting, retry config, disconnect handling) but includes unrelated files (constitution.md, PRD.md, ROADMAP.md) that shouldn't be part of this PR.
rationale.correctness: SSE formatting follows W3C spec correctly and handles both sync/async generators, but the exception handling is too broad (catches Exception and passes) which could mask real bugs.
rationale.style: Follows FastAPI conventions well with proper dataclass usage, type hints, docstrings, and import organization. Minor inconsistency in the broad exception catching.
rationale.quality: Code is readable with good separation of concerns (separate formatting function), but the overly broad exception handling reduces maintainability and could hide real issues during debugging.
